nodes.title: User Request
nodes.desc: Natural language instruction (e.g., "Find latest React docs", "Convert SVG to PNG")

nodes.title: Skill Lookup
nodes.desc: Search local skills (`list_installed_skills`) or remote (`search_skills`) using keywords & context

nodes.title: Load & Validate
nodes.desc: Read `SKILL.md`, check dependencies, verify tool access, validate input schema

nodes.title: Execute
nodes.desc: Run skill script with user inputs; handle errors, timeouts, sandbox limits

nodes.title: Return Result
nodes.desc: Structured output (text, file path, JSON) sent to user or main agent for synthesis
